UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Information about a user of the Cyberhound app.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

isPro.description: Whether the user has a Pro subscription.

searchCount.description: Number of searches performed by the user.

lastSearchResetAt.description: When the search count was last reset.

WatchlistDeal.title: WatchlistDeal
WatchlistDeal.description: A deal saved by a user to their watchlist.

id.description: The unique ID of the deal.

userId.description: The UID of the user who saved the deal.

relevanceScore.description: The relevance score of the deal.

/users/{uid}/watchlist/{dealId}.description: Deals saved to a user's watchlist.
